mapper.select: SELECT po.*, s.name as supplier_name, b.title as book_title FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN books b ON po.book_id = b.book_id WHERE po.purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}

SELECT po.*, s.name as supplier_name, b.title as book_title FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN books b ON po.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY po.order_date DESC

SELECT po.*, s.name as supplier_name, b.title as book_title FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN books b ON po.book_id = b.book_id WHERE po.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY po.order_date DESC

SELECT po.*, s.name as supplier_name, b.title as book_title FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN books b ON po.book_id = b.book_id WHERE po.status = #{status} ORDER BY po.order_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'confirmed' THEN 1 END) as confirmed, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'shipped' THEN 1 END) as shipped, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 END) as rejected FROM purchase_orders WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO missing_books(book_name, publisher, book_id, supplier_id, quantity, registration_date, user_id) VALUES (#{bookName}, #{publisher}, #{bookId}, #{supplierId}, #{quantity}, #{registrationDate}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM missing_books ORDER BY registration_date DESC
